new_value: {"notes":"2026-07-23 cross-impl review VERDICT: the uncommitted working-tree fix (oscore.c:380-386) is CORRECT - request_piv is appended after the already-present CBOR bstr header 0x40|len (lines 375-379), proper bstr in correct aad_array position 4. Verified byte-exact against RFC 8613 Appendix C.4 (AAD 8368456e63727970743040488501810a40411440 and ciphertext 612f1092f1776f1c1668b3825e reproduced from the fixed C algorithm), Rust build_aad_cbor (lib.rs:947-956), and aiocoap. The added request_piv NULL check in oscore_unprotect_response (:1900-1904) is sound C-specific hardening. HOWEVER the fix is necessary-not-sufficient for interop: C compute_nonce is still non-RFC for non-empty sender IDs (new P0 bead project-LICHEN-mmgu.1), and no C test calls oscore_protect_request (mmgu.18.4). Recommend: commit this fix + land RFC C.4-C.8 C tests in the same change, then close."}
